title: Derp's Compat for Every Compat
description: It changes wood some textures to be special. This is mostly windows from Create. Note that these are woods that are in my modpack. This also fixes some textures like chests that are added by other mods to work with Abnormals' Woodworks.
body: Texture changes for some stuff like create's windows. Supports woods that are in my modpack. This would mostly be RANDOM ASS WOODS BRO HOLY MOLY.
